model_specification_line: results = smf.wls(formula="full_time_employed ~ daca_eligible * post_daca + age_june2012 + I(age_june2012 ** 2) + C(sex) + C(year) + C(statefip) + UNEMP + LFPR + DRIVERSLICENSES + INSTATETUITION + STATEFINANCIALAID + HIGHEREDBAN + EVERIFY + LIMITEVERIFY + OMNIBUS + TASK287G + JAIL287G + SECURECOMMUNITIES", data=analysis_df, weights=analysis_df["perwt"]).fit(cov_type="cluster", cov_kwds={"groups": analysis_df["statefip"]})
sample_selection: Keep ACS observations from 2008-2011 and 2013-2016 only; exclude 2012 because DACA was implemented mid-year.
Restrict to ethnically Mexican Hispanic Mexican-born respondents (hispan == 1 and bpl == 200).
Restrict to foreign-born noncitizens who proxy for lacking lawful status (citizen in [3, 4, 5]).
Approximate DACA childhood-arrival and continuous-residence requirements with yrimmig <= birthyr + 15 and yrimmig <= 2007.
Restrict to birth cohorts 1979-1984 with observed birth quarter to compare cohorts close to the June 15, 1981 age-eligibility cutoff.
